title: MiniMax M3登顶B.AI最受欢迎模型
full_text:

Post
MiniMax (official)
@MiniMax_AI
Thanks to the @ BAI_AGI team for making M3 available from day one.

21h
👑 @ MiniMax_AI 's MiniMax M3 is now the #1 most popular model on B.AI .
From topping the open source rankings to leading our charts, MiniMax M3 is winning users over and it's currently FREE to use on B.AI .
